languages.text: "Рота Оведия Гапрака уничтожена по моему приказу, все так. Палатина Лорканда, узнав от меня об их приближении, обрушила всю мощь {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Адепта Сороритас{/g} на их головы. Но Оведий выжил, что не входило в мой план. Камилла Драйвстем с удовольствием согласилась помочь мне, а заодно — свести счеты со старым недругом. Капитан Зауэрбэк оказался достаточно компетентным и амбициозным, чтобы исполнить столь деликатное поручение".
languages.translation_comment: стартует DL_KnowJuvennaIntrigue, DL_KnowKamillaMurderer, DL_KnowIzimondMurderer, DL_KnowGaprakAmbushed, закрываем Obj3_TalkJuvenna, выдаем Obj3_Add_JuvennaIntrigue, Obj1_Add_IzimondMurderer и Obj1_Add_GaprakBombed

Капитан Зауэрбэк оказался достаточно компетентным и амбициозным, чтобы исполнить столь деликатное поручение".

languages.translation_comment: стартует DL_KnowJuvennaIntrigue, DL_KnowKamillaMurderer, DL_KnowIzimondMurderer, DL_KnowGaprakAmbushed, закрываем Obj3_TalkJuvenna, выдаем Obj3_Add_JuvennaIntrigue, Obj1_Add_IzimondMurderer и Obj1_Add_GaprakBombed

languages.text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."
languages.original_text: "Рота Оведия Гапрака уничтожена по моему приказу, все так. Палатина Лорканда, узнав от меня об их приближении, обрушила всю мощь {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Адепта Сороритас{/g} на их головы. Но Оведий выжил, что не входило в мой план. Капитан Зауэрбэк оказался достаточно компетентным и амбициозным, чтобы исполнить столь деликатное поручение".

But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

"Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the Adepta Sororitas down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

languages.text: «La compañía de Ovedius Gaprak fue destruida a mis órdenes, es cierto. Palatine Lorcanda, tras descubrir por mi intervención cuáles eran sus métodos, desató la furia del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} contra ellos. Pero Ovedius sobrevivió, lo que no era parte de mi plan. Camilla Drivestem estuvo encantada de ayudarme y ajustar cuentas con un viejo enemigo al mismo tiempo. El capitán Sauerback fue lo bastante competente y ambicioso como para realizar un encargo tan delicado».
languages.original_text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

traits.locale_text: «La compañía de Ovedius Gaprak fue destruida a mis órdenes, es cierto. Palatine Lorcanda, tras descubrir por mi intervención cuáles eran sus métodos, desató la furia del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} contra ellos. Pero Ovedius sobrevivió, lo que no era parte de mi plan. Camilla Drivestem estuvo encantada de ayudarme y ajustar cuentas con un viejo enemigo al mismo tiempo. El capitán Sauerback fue lo bastante competente y ambicioso como para realizar un encargo tan delicado».

languages.text: “奥维迪乌斯·贾帕克的人确实是我下令消灭的。帕拉蒂尼·洛坎达从我这里得知他们接近的消息后，便调动了{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}修女会{/g}的全部力量，给了他们沉重一击。但奥维迪乌斯活了下来，这不在我的计划之内。卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔很乐意帮我，同时也想一劳永逸地解决老对手。苏尔贝克上尉既有能力又有野心，正好适合执行这种棘手的差事。”
languages.original_text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

traits.locale_text: “奥维迪乌斯·贾帕克的人确实是我下令消灭的。帕拉蒂尼·洛坎达从我这里得知他们接近的消息后，便调动了{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}修女会{/g}的全部力量，给了他们沉重一击。但奥维迪乌斯活了下来，这不在我的计划之内。卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔很乐意帮我，同时也想一劳永逸地解决老对手。苏尔贝克上尉既有能力又有野心，正好适合执行这种棘手的差事。”

languages.text: « La compagnie d'Ovedius Gaprak a été anéantie sur mon ordre, je le reconnais. Quand je l'ai informée que ses troupes étaient en chemin, la palatine Lorcanda a aussitôt déployé la pleine puissance de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} pour leur barrer la route. Mais Ovedius a survécu, contrairement à ce que j'avais prévu. Camilla Drivestem s'est alors portée volontaire pour m'aider et régler ses comptes avec un vieil adversaire par la même occasion. Quant au capitaine Sauerback, il avait les compétences et l'ambition nécessaires pour mener à bien une mission aussi délicate. »
languages.original_text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

traits.locale_text: « La compagnie d'Ovedius Gaprak a été anéantie sur mon ordre, je le reconnais. Quand je l'ai informée que ses troupes étaient en chemin, la palatine Lorcanda a aussitôt déployé la pleine puissance de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} pour leur barrer la route. Mais Ovedius a survécu, contrairement à ce que j'avais prévu. Camilla Drivestem s'est alors portée volontaire pour m'aider et régler ses comptes avec un vieil adversaire par la même occasion. Quant au capitaine Sauerback, il avait les compétences et l'ambition nécessaires pour mener à bien une mission aussi délicate. »

languages.text: "Ovedius Gaprak'ın bölüğünün benim emirlerimle yok edildiği doğru. Onların yaklaştığını benden öğrenen Palatin Lorcanda, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas'ın{/g} tüm kudretini tepelerine indirdi. Fakat Ovedius hayatta kaldı ki bu, planımın bir parçası değildi. Camilla Drivestem bana yardım etmeye ve eski bir düşmanla hesabını tek bir darbede görmeye can atıyordu. Yüzbaşı Sauerback, böylesine hassas bir görevi yerine getirebilecek kadar yetkin ve hırslıydı."
languages.original_text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

traits.locale_text: "Ovedius Gaprak'ın bölüğünün benim emirlerimle yok edildiği doğru. Onların yaklaştığını benden öğrenen Palatin Lorcanda, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas'ın{/g} tüm kudretini tepelerine indirdi. Fakat Ovedius hayatta kaldı ki bu, planımın bir parçası değildi. Camilla Drivestem bana yardım etmeye ve eski bir düşmanla hesabını tek bir darbede görmeye can atıyordu. Yüzbaşı Sauerback, böylesine hassas bir görevi yerine getirebilecek kadar yetkin ve hırslıydı."

languages.text: "Ovedius Gapraks Kompanie wurde auf meinen Befehl vernichtet, das stimmt. Palatine Lorcanda, die ich über ihren Vormarsch informiert hatte, ließ sie die ganze Macht der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} spüren. Dass Ovedius überlebt, war nicht Teil meines Plans. Camilla Drivestem wollte mir helfen und gleichzeitig eine Rechnung mit einem alten Feind begleichen. Captain Sauerback war kompetent und ehrgeizig genug, einen so heiklen Auftrag anzunehmen."
languages.original_text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

traits.locale_text: "Ovedius Gapraks Kompanie wurde auf meinen Befehl vernichtet, das stimmt. Palatine Lorcanda, die ich über ihren Vormarsch informiert hatte, ließ sie die ganze Macht der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} spüren. Dass Ovedius überlebt, war nicht Teil meines Plans. Camilla Drivestem wollte mir helfen und gleichzeitig eine Rechnung mit einem alten Feind begleichen. Captain Sauerback war kompetent und ehrgeizig genug, einen so heiklen Auftrag anzunehmen."

languages.text: 「オベディウス・ガプラクの会社は私の命令で破壊された。それは事実だ。パレティーン・ロルカンダは私の情報から彼らの接近を知り、{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}アプタ・ソリタス{/g}の全力を彼らに浴びせた。しかしオベディウスは生き延びた。それは私の計画ではなかった。カミラ・ドライブステムは私を助けることと、一度に古い敵に復讐することを熱望していた。そして、サウアーバック大佐は、そんな繊細な任務を遂行するのに十分な能力と野心を持っていた。」
languages.original_text: "Ovedius Gaprak's company was destroyed on my orders, it is true. Palatine Lorcanda, having learned of their approach from me, brought the full might of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Adepta Sororitas{/g} down upon their heads. But Ovedius survived, which was not part of my plan. Camilla Drivestem was eager to assist me and to settle a score with an old foe in one fell swoop. Captain Sauerback was both competent and ambitious enough to carry out such a delicate commission."

traits.locale_text: 「オベディウス・ガプラクの会社は私の命令で破壊された。それは事実だ。パレティーン・ロルカンダは私の情報から彼らの接近を知り、{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}アプタ・ソリタス{/g}の全力を彼らに浴びせた。しかしオベディウスは生き延びた。それは私の計画ではなかった。カミラ・ドライブステムは私を助けることと、一度に古い敵に復讐することを熱望していた。そして、サウアーバック大佐は、そんな繊細な任務を遂行するのに十分な能力と野心を持っていた。」
